sections.heading: 1. Data Handling
sections.content: We only process the information you choose to provide. This may include exam details, instructions, or other text input necessary to generate the requested PDF output.

sections.heading: 2. AI Processing
sections.content: Input provided to this service may be processed by OpenAI for the purpose of generating responses. We do not store or retain conversation data on our own servers.

sections.heading: 3. PDF Generation
sections.content: When generating exam papers, the structured JSON sent to the PDF generation endpoint is processed temporarily for document rendering. The resulting PDF is returned to you and not archived.

sections.heading: 4. No User Account Storage
sections.content: We do not maintain user accounts, authentication records, or profile information. We do not collect or store email addresses, phone numbers, or personal identifiers.

sections.heading: 5. No Sale or Transfer of Data
sections.content: We do not sell, rent, or transfer your data to third parties for marketing or advertising.

sections.heading: 6. Sensitive Information
sections.content: Please avoid providing sensitive personal information (PII), financial data, medical records, or passwords. This service is not intended to process or store such information.

sections.heading: 7. Third-Party Systems
sections.content: PDF rendering and AI interactions depend on third-party systems (e.g. OpenAI) which may have their own privacy practices. Please review their policies for details.

sections.heading: 8. Data Retention
sections.content: Input and generated PDFs are only retained in-memory for the duration of the request and are not permanently stored.

sections.heading: 9. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this policy from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes indicates acceptance of the updated policy.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.content: If you have questions regarding data privacy, please contact the service operator.
